title: Raspi's Modpack
description: A super awesome modpack to improve the performance of Minecraft!
body:
Notice: None of the mods in this pack were made by me, so make sure to check out the original creators in the dependencies tab.

Raspi's modpack is a great modpack to improve your Minecraft experience! It has purely minimal performance mods and no QOL mods so you can play Minecraft like a pro without lag. I have made this pack as a base for you guys to add on your own mods so you don't have to deal with mods you don't like. 
If you do want some QOL mods, check out the extras version (the "b" version) with some mods I usually play with!

I hope you guys enjoy!

**If you are adding this to a modpack you may need to install Indium to allow compatibility with sodium.**

NEW: Raspi's Modpack Server Edition - Get it [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/raspis-modpack-server-edition)

If you have any problems, DM me on discord at @raspi_dude or join the Raspi World discord to get help!

https://discord.gg/fTKZgy2AJa

My yt: https://youtube.com/@raspi_dude
